description_long: This object consists of three donuts placed on a flat, light gray marble-like surface. Two of the donuts are dark brown, resembling chocolate, while the third is a light pink color, suggesting a strawberry or berry-flavored glaze. The donuts are ring-shaped with a smooth, slightly glossy finish, and appear to have a soft, cake-like texture. There are no visible toppings such as sprinkles or nuts, and the icing is evenly coated on the top surface of each donut. The donuts are unwrapped and not contained within any packaging, simply resting on the surface. The overall presentation is clean and minimal, with the donuts arranged close together in the center of the surface.
description: Three ring-shaped donuts—two chocolate and one pink—rest on a light gray marble surface, each with a smooth, glossy glaze and no visible toppings or packaging.
description_view_0: Three donuts, two dark brown and one pink, are seen on a marble surface with two pink cylindrical objects off to the left.
description_view_1: The donuts are centered on the marble surface, with a single pink cylindrical object floating above the surface in the background.
description_view_2: The donuts are viewed from the opposite side, with the pink donut now on the right and a pink cylindrical object to the right edge.
description_view_3: The donuts are again centered, with two pink cylindrical objects now visible to the left of the marble surface.
attribute_icing_type: smooth chocolate glaze on two donuts, smooth pink glaze on one donut
attribute_placement_location: on a flat, light gray marble-like surface
